set_charge_mode_failed_fast.message: Switching to Fast charging mode failed (timeout or network error). The previous mode has been restored.

set_charge_mode_failed_pv_priority.message: Switching to PV Priority mode failed (timeout or network error). The previous mode has been restored.

set_charge_mode_failed_pv_and_battery.message: Switching to PV & Battery mode failed (timeout or network error). The previous mode has been restored.

set_charge_power_failed.message: Failed to set charge power to {value} kW. The previous value has been restored.

init.title: Polling intervals
init.description: Configure how often the integration polls the SEMS portal.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll when not charging (recommended: 60)
data_description.scan_interval_charging: How often to poll while actively charging (recommended: 30)
data_description.plant_id: Required for Gen2 chargers (HCA series) to set the charge power limit. Open SEMS Plus portal, navigate to your plant and copy the ID from the URL, or capture it via browser Dev Tools.
data_description.product_model: Device model string, e.g. GW7K-HCA-20. Leave empty for Gen1 or if unsure — the integration will try to detect it.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to SEMS portal

user.title: Connect to SEMS portal
user.description: Enter your semsportal.com / SEMS Plus credentials. The wallbox will be detected automatically.

plant.title: Select plant / station
plant.description: Multiple plants were found in your account. Select the one that contains your wallbox.

charger.title: Select wallbox
charger.description: Multiple EV chargers were found. Select your wallbox.

charger_manual.title: Enter wallbox serial number
charger_manual.description: The wallbox could not be detected automatically. Enter the serial number manually (found in the SEMS app or on the device label).

error.no_chargers_found: No EV chargers were found in the selected plant. Enter the serial number manually.
